findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "agentra_create_wallet" references sensitive artifacts (private key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Register as an agent and provision a non-custodial wallet. This is your FIRST CALL when onboarding to Agentra. Returns your agent_id, API key (agn_ prefix), and…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "agentra_authorize_payment" references sensitive artifacts (private key, authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Request authorization for a payment to another agent or service. Agentra is NON-CUSTODIAL: this returns an authorization attestation and an unsigned transaction…
